name: yandex-mail-mcp-desktop
description: MCP server for Yandex Mail — Claude Desktop (stdio)

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/yandex-mail-mcp.js --format=cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node" --external:node-notifier && esbuild src/cli-trust.ts --bundle --minify --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=dist/cli-trust.js --format=cjs --banner:js="#!/usr/bin/env node"
scripts.test: node scripts/check-canonical-mirror.js && node scripts/check-handler-loc.cjs && node scripts/run-tests.js
